text:
This exit said “slow down,” the truck said “nah.”

A truck pulling a trailer full of generators jackknifed at the I-80 eastbound to Donner Gate off-ramp, and now the Donner Gate to eastbound I-80 on-ramp is temporarily closed while crews undo the decision.
